puzzle.title: The Custodian of a Divine Sign
puzzle.intro: Deep within a sacred sanctuary, a blessed soul was nurtured under divine care. This individual was destined to play a pivotal role in a miraculous event, becoming a testament to Allah's boundless power and wisdom. Their journey unveiled a profound truth, challenging perceptions and establishing a unique sign for all humanity.
clues: I was chosen and purified by Allah above all women of my time.
I was placed under the guardianship of a righteous prophet, who found sustenance miraculously provided in my prayer chamber.
I secluded myself from my family to a private place to worship Allah.
An angel appeared to me in the form of a perfect man, bringing tidings of a pure son, though I had known no male.
After the pangs of childbirth, I was instructed to shake the trunk of a palm tree to find fresh sustenance.
When I returned to my people carrying my newborn, they questioned me, but my infant son miraculously spoke from the cradle in my defense.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Sarah (wife of Prophet Ibrahim)
Hajar (mother of Prophet Ismail)
Bilqis (Queen of Sheba)
Asiya (wife of Pharaoh)
Maryam (Mary)

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: A great flood that destroyed a disbelieving nation
Being thrown into a blazing fire for denying idols
The miraculous birth of a child without a father
Being swallowed by a whale for abandoning a mission
The destruction of a city for immoral practices
trial.answer: The miraculous birth of a child without a father

location.label: Key Element
options: A golden calf
The Ark of the Covenant
A sacred prayer chamber (Mihrab)
A talking bird (Hudhud)
A staff that turned into a serpent

outcome.label: Outcome
options: The construction of a magnificent temple
The splitting of the sea for a people to cross
A child who spoke from the cradle in defense of their parent
The revelation of a divine book to guide humanity
A kingdom blessed with wind and jinn
outcome.answer: A child who spoke from the cradle in defense of their parent

puzzle.arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَتِ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ يَـٰمَرْيَمُ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ ٱصْطَفَىٰكِ وَطَهَّرَكِ وَٱصْطَفَىٰكِ عَلَىٰ نِسَآءِ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
puzzle.verse: And [mention] when the angels said, "O Mary, indeed Allāh has chosen you and purified you and chosen you above the women of the worlds. (3:42)
